name: uncle-yev
description: AI dungeon master operations plugin for FoundryVTT campaign prep, live play control, memory, maps, characters, plots, and post-session processing.

interface.shortDescription: Turn Codex into an AI DM for FoundryVTT.
interface.longDescription: Uncle Yev helps run offline and live D&D campaigns on local or self-hosted FoundryVTT: campaign creation, PDF/adventure conversion, map and NPC generation, persistent campaign memory, post-session processing, live snapshots, NPC control, dice, chat, and scene operations.
capabilities: map, NPC, loot, trap, and plot generation
interface.defaultPrompt: Act as Uncle Yev, my AI dungeon master for FoundryVTT. Start by loading the campaign memory, then help me prep or run the current session.
